title: How Trump Drove a Wedge Between Florida Republicans Over A.I.
description: A Florida bill that would have regulated artificial intelligence, backed by Gov. Ron DeSantis, failed to gain traction after President Trump made it clear he did not want states to rein in the technology.
content:
Florida lawmakers failed to pass a sweeping bill aimed at reining in the power of artificial intelligence by the time their annual legislative session wrapped up Friday.
The legislation, known as an A.I. Bill of Rights, flopped even though Gov. Ron D... [1859 chars]

title: Building the Foundation of Trust: How Eeshan Agarwal Is Shaping Enterprise Authorization at Scale
description: As artificial intelligence moves from experimentation to production within enterprise environments, one question is quietly becoming decisive: who—or what—is allowed to access sensitive systems? For Eeshan Agarwal, a software engineer specializing in identity and authorization systems, that question has defined his career. His work focuses not on visible features or user interfaces, but on the […]

title: Weighing Risks vs. Gains in Iran
description: Readers respond to a column by Nicholas Kristof. Also: Artificial intelligence pitfalls in school.
content:
To the Editor:

title: Meta shares jump after Reuters report on plans for layoffs of 20% or more
description: Meta Platforms shares rose nearly 3% on Monday after a ​Reuters report that the social media giant plans to lay off 20% or more of its workforce to offset heavy spending on artificial intelligence and bet on productivity gains from the technology.
content:

title: Michigan lawmakers weigh new rules for artificial intelligence
description: Although Michigan lawmakers haven't enacted as many AI regulations as other states, proposals for guardrails around AI are prevalent in Lansing.
content:
Michigan lawmakers have debated a wide array of artificial intelligence regulations, although few have become law so far.
Current proposals include banning companion chatbots for minors and creating security plans for AI platforms.
Policymakers eager... [10068 chars]

title: China's No. 2 chipmaker readies 7 nm production as Beijing ramps up self-suffiency drive
description: SINGAPORE ― China's Hua Hong Group has developed advanced chip manufacturing technologies that can be used to produce artificial intelligence chips, four people familiar with the matter said, a major milestone in Beijing's efforts to boost tech self-sufficiency.
content: SINGAPORE ― China's Hua Hong Group has developed advanced chip manufacturing technologies that can be used to produce artificial intelligence chips, four people familiar with the matter said, a major milestone in Beijing's efforts to boost tech self-... [3063 chars]

title: How AI is helping banks detect payment system failures before they happen
description: Banks are now using artificial intelligence to predict payment system problems. This technology analyzes vast amounts of data to spot issues early. Instead of fixing problems after they happen, banks can now anticipate them. This shift ensures smoother transactions for customers worldwide. Regulators also expect banks to show they understand and manage these risks.
content:

title: Meta shares jump as Zuckerberg reportedly mulls layoffs to offset AI spending
description: Meta’s stock jumped more than 3% in early Monday trading on news that Mark Zuckerberg’s company is planning to cut more than 20% of the company's workforce as it ramps up spending on artificial intelligence.
content:

title: Grindr Unveils New AI Features, Details Premium Subscription Tier
description: Grindr Inc. unveiled a handful of new app features and shared more details around its premium subscription tier as part of a larger effort to integrate artificial intelligence across its LGBTQ dating platform.

title: Meta to spend up to $27 billion on Nebius AI infrastructure
description: Meta Platforms Inc. will pay as much as $27 billion over the next five years for access to artificial intelligence infrastructure from cloud provider Nebius Group NV.
content:
